non_compliance_flags.message: F04 fire alarm feeder is essential supply class — recommend secondary supply via ATS at the FA1 sub-board.

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.8 (commercial general per IEC 60364-1 Annex C).
Cable ampacity assumes IEC 60364-5-52 Reference Method E (multicore in free air).
Fault currents engineer-declared from manufacturer cascade table for ABB Tmax XT MCCBs paired with Emax 2 ACB.

rationale.chat_summary: 800A TPN main switchboard for an INT commercial office, Form 4b for compartmentalised maintenance access. Four MCCB feeders to sub-DBs (Lighting, Power, Mechanical, Fire Alarm). All cascade pairs verified selective to 36 kA via engineer-declared manufacturer cascade table. INFO flag recommending ATS for the fire alarm sub-board. Reply to refine.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: INT commercial MSB, IEC 61439-2 PSC Form 4b, IP30 for indoor electrical room.

decisions.label: Form 4b enclosure
decisions.summary: Full separation including individual terminal separation — best maintenance access + arc-flash safety.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 400V TPN 800A ACB main from utility transformer (Ze 0.05Ω).

decisions.label: 800A ACB main breaker
decisions.summary: Drawout ACB suits service-entrance role with full protection programmability.
decisions.rule: IEC 60947-2 ACB selection for service entrance

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 800A busbar matches main rating, IcW 36 kA accommodates declared 25 kA fault. Diversified load 395A; 50% headroom.

decisions.label: 800A busbar IcW 36 kA
decisions.summary: Sized to match incoming ACB + exceed declared fault current.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 12 ways used (4 × 3-pole feeders W1-W12), 8 ways spare (exceeds minimum 4).

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: All MCCBs Type D curve (motor-friendly for sub-DB feeders). In ≤ Iz verified for every feeder. Icn 36 kA exceeds declared 25 kA Ifault.

decisions.label: Type D curve for all feeders
decisions.summary: Sub-DB feeders downstream often serve motor circuits — D curve avoids nuisance trip.
decisions.rule: IEC 60898 / IEC 60947-2 device curve selection for inrush

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: No RCD at MSB level (sub-DBs handle their own RCD strategy per IEC 60364-4-41 411.5). F04 fire alarm essential supply not RCD-protected upstream.

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: Feeder cables sized per IEC 60364-5-52 Reference Method E (multicore in free air). All sizes pass In ≤ Iz check.

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 4 cascade pairs (MAIN → F01..F04) verified selective to 36 kA via engineer-declared manufacturer cascade table (ABB Tmax XT MCCBs paired with Emax 2 ACB).

decisions.label: Full discrimination at 36 kA
decisions.summary: ACB-MCCB cascade fully selective per ABB cascade table.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One INFO flag recommending ATS for fire alarm sub-board.
